creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Stop doing this in London ❗️

London is one of the most visited cities in the world, and I totally get why, as I literally used to run a travel agency that specialized in London 😅

London is a pretty easy city to visit no matter where you come from, but there are a few classic mistakes I see tourists always make.

Have you made any of these mistakes in London? Or do you have another tourist mistake that grinds your gears? 

Share them with your fellow travellers in a comment 🤝

#london #londontravel #touristlife #lovegreatbritain

transcription.text: Avoid these tourist mistakes when you're in London. Coming from a former travel agency owner who used to customize trips to London. Don't bring your big bulky luggage on the tube in rush hour. The locals will hate you, but they'll probably only stare at you angrily because they are British after all. Don't eat at Angus Steakhouse. It's just a chain restaurant with low quality food only catering to tourists. Don't use the Heathrow Express or the Gatwick Express. Just use the way cheaper Elizabeth line from Heathrow or the Thameslink or Southern trains from Gatwick. If you don't spend all your time in Zone 1, make sure you get out of the city centre and experience some of the pubs and restaurants that the locals actually go to. But don't underestimate the time it takes to cross the city. London is absolutely massive, so use apps like City Mapper or Google Maps to check the best route on public transport.
